productDisplayName: Nike Men's Air Dictate White Shoe
description: Get more comfort and enjoyment out of your fitness training with the nike Air Dictate men's running shoes. Packed with performance features, the nike Air Dictate is a great choice for your daily runs.Upper Breathable sandwich mesh upper with synthetic overlays for breathabilty and support No-sew overlays in the midfoot offers a secure, irritation-free feel Extra heel support to lock the backfoot in place and potect it from injuries Padded lining for a comfortable step in feel Padded tongue and collar for added comfort Lace-ups for snug Fit and to lock the foot in place Mesh tongue for breathability Swoosh logo on the sides to create a style statement Midsole Air cushioning unit in the pylon midsole guarantees a smooth and responsive ride Medial and lateral Air-Sole midsole units deliver supreme cushioning Outsole BRS 1000 durable rubber outsole Waffle-pattern grip for excellent traction Heel crash pad helps reduce impacting shock and set the foot up for a smooth transition TPU shank adds extra support BRS 1000 rubber outsole for long-lasting wear Wash careDo not machine washRemove dust and dirt with dry clean cloth
